commands.review_summary:
The PR refactors the read workspace-root guard to accept explicit additional container mounts, wires the read-only `/agent` mount for sandboxed read tools, adds regression tests and a test-helper option, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main gives a high-confidence path: the read guard only remaps `containerWorkdir`, the current mounted-paths test expects `/agent` reads to fail under workspace-only mode, and docs define `/agent` as the read-only workspace mount.
commands.review_followup: This active external PR has no code findings from this review, but it needs contributor-provided real behavior proof and sandbox owner review rather than an automated repair.

The PR adds the virtual Communication Notifications tab/icon, browser regression coverage, and an Unreleased changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows Communication includes __notifications__ with virtual sections enabled, but the tab generator only emits virtual sections present in SECTION_CATEGORIES, where Notifications is missing.

commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a CLI status Channels-table merge helper, wires it into status overview runtime, adds merge/overview tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. for the code path: the PR head still disables live channel status for plain `openclaw status`, and the new merge only runs when `channelsStatus` exists. I did not establish a live configured Telegram reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Contributor changes and non-empty real behavior proof are needed before merge; automation should not queue a repair while the external proof gate is unmet and the default-status contract needs maintainer judgment.
